description: Software/IP Licensing Agreement - covers software licenses, IP grants, SaaS subscriptions, and technology licensing terms

license_metadata.description: Basic agreement identification and party information

agreement_title.description: Official title of the licensing agreement

effective_date.description: Date the license agreement becomes effective

expiration_date.description: Date the license agreement expires, if not perpetual

licensor_name.description: Full legal name of the party granting the license

licensee_name.description: Full legal name of the party receiving the license

governing_law.description: Jurisdiction whose laws govern the agreement

jurisdiction.description: Courts or venue for disputes arising under the agreement

parent_agreement_reference.description: Reference to a parent or master agreement under which this license is issued

grant_of_license.description: License grant scope, type, and usage rights

licensed_product_or_ip.description: Name or description of the software, product, or intellectual property being licensed

license_type.description: Duration model of the license grant

license_scope.description: Exclusivity scope of the license grant

territory.description: Geographic territory in which the license may be exercised

field_of_use.description: Specific field, industry, or purpose for which the license is restricted

sublicense_rights.description: Whether and under what conditions the licensee may sublicense the rights

number_of_users_or_seats.description: Number of authorized users, seats, or instances permitted under the license

deployment_model.description: How the licensed software is deployed or hosted

usage_restrictions.description: Specific restrictions on how the licensed product may be used

open_source_components.description: Disclosure or treatment of open-source software components included in the licensed product

fees_and_payment.description: License fees, payment structure, and support costs

license_fee.description: Total or base license fee amount

fee_structure.description: How the license fee is structured and billed

currency.description: Currency in which fees are denominated

payment_schedule.description: Schedule or timing for fee payments

maintenance_fee.description: Annual maintenance or support fee amount or percentage

maintenance_fee_escalation_cap_percent.description: Maximum annual percentage increase allowed for maintenance fees

support_tier.description: Level of support included or purchased

support_hours.description: Hours during which support is available

implementation_fees.description: Fees for initial implementation, setup, or deployment services

training_fees.description: Fees for training services related to the licensed product

true_up_frequency.description: How often usage or seat counts are reconciled against actual usage

audit_rights_for_usage.description: Licensor's rights to audit licensee's usage of the licensed product

intellectual_property.description: IP ownership, customizations, and related rights

ownership_of_licensed_ip.description: Statement of who owns the underlying licensed intellectual property

ownership_of_customizations.description: Who owns customizations, configurations, or modifications made to the licensed product

ownership_of_derivatives.description: Who owns derivative works created from or based on the licensed product

trademark_usage_rights.description: Rights to use licensor's or licensee's trademarks, logos, or branding

source_code_access.description: Whether licensee has access to source code and under what conditions

exists.description: Whether a source code escrow arrangement is in place

escrow_agent.description: Name of the escrow agent holding the source code

release_triggers.description: Events that trigger release of escrowed source code to licensee

patent_grants.description: Any patent licenses or grants included with the license

moral_rights.description: Treatment of moral rights in the licensed intellectual property

support_and_maintenance.description: Ongoing support, maintenance, and update obligations

support_scope.description: Scope and nature of support services provided

response_time_targets.description: Target response times organized by severity level

bug_fix_obligations.description: Obligations to fix bugs, defects, or errors in the licensed product

update_frequency.description: How often updates, patches, or minor releases are provided

upgrade_included.description: Whether major version upgrades are included in the license or maintenance fees

end_of_life_policy.description: Policy for end-of-life or end-of-support of the licensed product or version

backwards_compatibility.description: Commitments regarding backwards compatibility in updates and upgrades

documentation_obligations.description: Obligations to provide or maintain documentation for the licensed product

data_and_security.description: Data ownership, portability, security, and compliance requirements

data_ownership.description: Who owns the data entered into, processed by, or generated by the licensed product

data_portability.description: Rights and mechanisms for exporting or migrating data out of the licensed product

data_format_on_exit.description: Format in which data will be returned upon termination or expiration

encryption_requirements.description: Requirements for data encryption at rest and in transit

access_controls.description: Requirements for access controls, authentication, and authorization

security_certifications.description: Required or maintained security certifications and compliance standards

breach_notification_requirements.description: Requirements for notifying the other party in case of a data or security breach

data_residency_requirements.description: Requirements for where data must be stored geographically

backup_obligations.description: Obligations for data backup frequency, retention, and recovery

disaster_recovery.description: Disaster recovery and business continuity obligations

warranties_and_liability.description: Warranties, liability limitations, and indemnification provisions

performance_warranty.description: Warranty that the licensed product will perform in accordance with specifications or documentation

infringement_warranty.description: Warranty that the licensed product does not infringe third-party intellectual property rights

virus_free_warranty.description: Warranty that the licensed product is free from viruses, malware, or malicious code

limitation_of_liability.description: Cap on total liability under the agreement

cap_type.description: How the liability cap is structured

cap_amount.description: Specific cap amount or formula for calculating the cap

consequential_damages_excluded.description: Whether indirect, consequential, incidental, or special damages are excluded

indemnification_for_ip_claims.description: Obligation to indemnify and defend against third-party IP infringement claims

term_and_termination.description: License term, renewal, termination rights, and post-termination obligations

initial_term.description: Duration of the initial license term

auto_renewal.description: Whether the license automatically renews and under what conditions

termination_for_convenience_notice_days.description: Number of days written notice required for termination without cause

termination_for_breach_cure_period.description: Cure period allowed to remedy a material breach before termination

effects_of_termination.description: Consequences and obligations that arise upon termination or expiration

data_return.description: Obligations regarding return or destruction of licensee data

license_cessation.description: When and how license rights cease upon termination

survival_clauses.description: Clauses or sections that survive termination of the agreement

transition_assistance_period_days.description: Number of days of transition assistance provided after termination
